allow: Bash(node -e "const a = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(a.prototype || a\).slice\(0,20\)\); const c = new a\({apiKey:'test'}\); console.log\(typeof c.messages?.stream\);")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); const c = new a\({apiKey:'test'}\); const methods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.messages\)\); console.log\(methods\);")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); const MessageStream = a.MessageStream || \(a.default?.MessageStream\); console.log\('MessageStream:', !!MessageStream\); const c = new a\({apiKey:'test'}\); const stream = c.messages.stream; console.log\('stream type:', typeof stream\); ")

PowerShell($body = '{"diagnostico":{"titulo":"Semana sobrecarregada","emoji":"X","descricao":"Muitos compromissos.","scoreDiscreto":25}}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/plano-acao" -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Host "mensagem length:" $r.mensagem.Length; Write-Host "quickReplies:" \($r.quickReplies -join ", "\); Write-Host "historico entries:" $r._historico.Count)
